title: Trimmed Armor [Flow Gold]
description: A texture pack which makes your armor trimmed already.
body:
Have you ever wanted to trim your armor but didn't have any trims?
Well then this texture pack is just for you.
This texture pack basically makes your netherite armor already trimmed with the flow armor trim with gold material.
You can combine this texture pack with real armor trims to make unique armor trim combinations.
